top_canada_figi_queue_review_batches.recommended_next_source: Stronger FIGI source or reviewed OpenFIGI re-check evidence for the existing reviewed source gap.
top_canada_figi_queue_review_batches.source_gate: Do not re-probe or fill FIGI from symbol/name; keep blank until stronger reviewed FIGI evidence exists.

policy.input_gate: Only canada_residual_review rows with valid ISIN, missing FIGI, and figi_decision=missing_figi_openfigi_candidate are queued.
policy.reviewed_gap_gate: Rows with an accepted OpenFIGI no-match or FIGI-collision review are excluded until a stronger source is available.
policy.no_symbol_guessing: Rows without ISIN are excluded; OpenFIGI candidate selection must still prefer the Canada exchange hint and ticker.
